positive: A whimsical and stylized portrait of a friendly celestial guardian owl sitting on a crescent moon, surrounded by a wreath of glowing bioluminescent flora and interconnected star constellations. The style is a vibrant, detailed line art illustration mixed with soft watercolor washes, giving it a dreamlike, mystic atmosphere. The composition should be centralized, focusing on the owl's gentle gaze and the detailed botanical elements. Use a high contrast color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, cosmic purples, glowing teal accents, and soft gold highlights. The final image must have clean, distinct silhouettes suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer, with strong definition and visual hierarchy.
negative: blurry, grainy, bokeh, low contrast, photorealistic, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, fuzzy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, overly complex, cluttered
